1.content:
Oliver walked towards his apartment. Another day, another dollar. Too bad he didn't get paid a whole heck of a lot, but he supposed it was enough to at least put a roof over his head. Walking up to his apartment he was surprised to find something curious just outside the building. One was a strange looking car, the other was a man standing in front of what looked like a Police Box. As he walked by the stranger spoke.

"Would you like a Jelly baby?"

"What?"

"A Jelly baby," the stranger held up an open bag. Oliver's Mom always warned him about taking stuff from strangers, but there was something about the man. Shrugging he took one from the Bag.

"They're really good aren't they?" the man mused."Great for increasing energy and health. Why don't you take the whole bag? I can always get more."

"Thank you. Who are you, if you don't mind me asking."

"I'm The Doctor."

"Doctor Who?"

"Correct."

Without saying another word the stranger with the scarf stepped into the Police Box. Shrugging Oliver walked up the steps of his apartment and was inside before he could notice the Police Box disappear. Stepping into his apartment he checked his phone messages, ate and checked his email.


Meanwhile in another Reality, on another dimensional plane, on the planet Mobius, Miles "Tails" Power was busy finishing his latest invention. It was finally ready. After countless hours of research, development, and hard work the Matter Transmitter was completed. Tails looked at his invention with satisfaction.

"Everything should be hooked up; the generator is at full power, the capacitor is charged, the coordinates are-"

"Tails..."

"Sonic!"Snapped Sally.

"Sorry, but come on! Let's do this already! I wanna see if you managed to make something faster than me!"

"It's been in the making for 4 months now;" said Sally "I think we can wait another minute."

" We can't rush this;" Explained Tails "We need to make sure everything is right! Who knows what can go wrong?"

"That's why you have me."

The Voice had come from NICOLE, Sally's personal handheld Computer, which Sally held upright toward a bank of computers."I'll be overseeing the progress as it executes; I'll be able to detect any faults and immediately stop it."

"Well; everything looks ready on my end;" Tails Finally said. "Sally, why don't you go ahead and connect NICOLE to the console over there."

Sally walked over a work table. Setting NICOLE down, she plugged in a cable, the other end of it plugged into the computer banks." How does it look?"

The little computer was silent for a moment." All systems operational; awaiting start."

"That's my queue." said Tails.

****

The first thing Oliver felt was a sudden tingling sensation all over his body as though he were touching a static ball. Then came a high pitch sound that seemed to be coming from nowhere and everywhere.

"What's Hap--"

Before he could finish, Oliver watched in awe his apartment disappeared around him. He found himself in darkness, partials of energy swirled all round him. .

*Where while Oliver re-appear?*
1.title: The Adventure Begins

choices: Teliportation failed Oliver appears to have vanished.
11.content:
"What's Happening?" asked Sally looking over Tail's shoulder.

"It's Impossible." said Tails astonished, "Something is in the matter stream."

"What do you mean "Something"?" Demanded Sonic.

"I mean something suddenly materialized inside the Teleportation beam. It wasn't there a second ago. I'm getting more data now...It's a life form."

"Can you send it back where it came from?"

"Sally, I don't even know yet where it came from. One thing's for sure If I have to bring in whatever it is in or it's pattern will degrade and it'll die."

"Maybe we should let it die."

Sally looked over at Sonic, not quite believing what she heard "Sonic, we can just Kill whatever it is!"

"It could be a threat bigger than Egg Man."

"Then again it might not. I'm willing to take the risk. Tails, bring it in."

Tails worked the consol sending commands to the Teleporter. Tails hadn't counted on materializing anyone in this phase of testing. The pattern caught in the matter stream was immediately sent through the pattern buffer. It was an incredibly slow process. He estimated the atomized life form would be in the pattern buffer a full sixty seconds before the rematerilization process began. Something he hoped to speed up as he made improvements to the unit. The Teleportation pad began to glow finally and a swirl of energy began to take shape. It was small, Very small, and shaped like an overlander (the comic name for Human). A moment past and the shape began to solidify and they could make out his clothing, and skin texture.

12.content:
With a faint popping sound Oliver found himself appearing in a rather odd place he was on a enormous table or was it a countertop?

Whatever it was the thing was the length and height of two whole football fields combined! He could actually run across the thing and it would take him possibly two whole days to make it to the other side there was also a enormous flower pot on the table with a fresh bunch of flowers he had no idea what kind they were freshly watered and a coaster for glasses plus a picture one look.....

Oliver instantly knew where he was "What th- hold up that is Sonic the Hedgehog, the video game character from Sega Genesis? But it can't be...."

But no doubt it certainly was there was no doubting the blue spiky hair and body and red super fast sneakers he was surrounded by a few other animal characters Oliver recognized Tails, the two-tailed fox Sonic's best friend and kid brother so to speak but the others...there was a purple walrus with a green baseball cap and a weird fox like thing in some type of palace guard's uniform looking smug, a squirrel with bright red hair in a blue vest and a girl rabbit whose legs and lower body was covered in parts of a metallic form

"Tails I have no trouble recognizing but who are these other guys?" Oliver thought wildly as he was only familiar with the video games characters like Amy Rose, Knuckles and Cream the Rabbit.

He knew instantly but these people he didn't know who any of them were and so he took a closer look at his enormous surroundings everything looked primitive yet there was a computer in the far right corner of the room as he stood there pondering this the door at the left right suddenly opened up and the squirrel with the red hair and blue vest came walking in.

Fortunately she was too busy looking at a palm hand computer and speaking into it to take any notice of the tiny person on her table a few feet away

"Nicole please is the process ready yet?' As she took a seat in a wooden chair just a mere two feet from where Oliver was trying to hide behind the giant flower pot.

NICOLE was uttering a response in a female HAL computerized voice he couldn't quite make out but it didn't matter as long as he stayed hidden he thought

"She won't be able to see me I'll just have to wait until she falls asleep or something...."

But it seemed this squirrel girl whom Oliver soon learned was named Princess Sally Acorn was either stuck to her seat or else she was too engrossed in whatever she was doing with her handheld computer thing NICOLE she sat there for hours on end not even moving typing away or speaking into the device and Oliver's right foot began to fall asleep he couldn't stand it

"Darn it doesn't this squirrel ever sleep or do anything else?" He needed to move now as his foot was killing him so taking a dare he slowly began to inch away from the pot while keeping a watchful eye on the giant Sally in front of him in case her blue eyes darted towards him inch by inch he made his way from the flower pot until he was sure he could make a run for it behind the picture frame at least until he could plan his next move as Sally put up her computer and announced to herself how tired she was as she sought to get up and head to bed.

Oliver looked around for some clue to see where the hell he is but unfortunately found none Thinking of an idea Oliver then sprouts one and says "Maybe I should climb on one of these trees and see where the hell am I After all I could see a better view while trying to find out where I am" Oliver walked and approach one of the unusual trees It was a strange tree indeed The trunk was very thin and skinny and was green in color instead of the actual black brown or red that tree trunks would normally do Grabbing the trunk he start to climb up the trunk and surprising it was real easy but a little slippery too Nevertheless Oliver already made it to the top of the tree

But as he got there he soon discovered a shocking truth about this strange forest when he sees the "tree" he's standing on Looking at top of this "tree" he sees that the top was flat and it have giant....petals? "Why would this tree have petals on the sides of this tree like a.......flower?!" asked Oliver But he soon discovered the shocking truth as he then quickly looking around the surrounding area "Wait a minute this isn't a forest this is a field of giant freaking flowers!" yelled Oliver Everything around him were just giant flowers Is this really a dream or a actual alien world? Oliver then start to look around when suddenly he caught a glimpse of...
13.title: Oliver appears in a feild of Giant Flowers

choices: Climb up into the wicker basket
Oliver watches for a bit before deciding anything.
1341.content:
Cream was wandering around as usual on a day off.

She walked away from her house to her favorite field near the mountainside. At that time of the year the field was full of wonderful flowers. As always when she would go here she had a basket with her that she used to collect the flowers. Cream knelt down to pick up many different flowers as she could; planning to make a nice bouquet for her mother out of them.

***

Oliver's jaw hit the ground.

Staring up through giant flowers he saw a Giant version of Cream the Rabbit. Impossible as that sounded. She was humming a little tune picking flowers that grew all around him. The huge tree like flower next to him was ripped out of the ground roots and all.

‘What power she has’ he thought in amazement.

And what Big feet she had! If he wasn't careful he could get squashed. Oliver guessed he was no bigger than a tiny bug next to her.

****
Cream didn't take any notice of the figure, which was hidden between the flowers. She simply continued picking this or that flower humming her song and walking as well as jumping through the field - obviously unaware that with her jumps might cause what would feel like earthquakes to the bugs around her if she landed close to them - or that she might even step on them.

***
“HOLY SHIT!”

Oliver just managed to dodge a massive foot as it crashed down just mere inches away from his right leg. The kid was in a real good mood but that didn’t help him much, that last little hop she made nearly pan caked him. She hopped a bit again leaving a deep crater of a foot print behind.

***
Once her basket was full, she decided not to go home just yet. She fell backwards into the field to relax and enjoy the nice warmth.

***
Cream turned, placed her basket full of flowers to one side and promptly fell backwards. Between the wind from the displacement of air and the powerful tremor through the ground Oliver was sent sprawling.

When the dust had settled, Oliver coughed and stood up brushed off dirt and debris. Looking directly in front of him he found himself staring at two huge feet propped up vertically, the soles of the shoes covered in clumps of dirt and other debris. She was sitting down.
1341.title: Cream

13411.content:
Well, that made things easier for him.

Oliver walked along her leg to the hem of her dress and climbed up onto it. His heart pounded in his chest, his breath quickened. This was either incredibly brave or incredibly stupid. Oliver walked the length of her dress over lap. The young rabbit's eyes were focused elsewhere so she hadn't seen him yet. And it was very doubtful that she had felt him as he made her way over her.

He steeled himself, took in a deep breath to call out to her, and prayed what he was about to do wasn't going to get him killed.

Cream heard the voice. Instantly stood up to see who was calling, obviously sending the small figure on her chest tumbling head over heels down dress to the ground below. It didn’t go unnoticed, however. Cream saw something small falling off her landing at her feet. Looking down she saw a very small figure lying among the flowers. Cream knelt down but too afraid to even touch that figure as he seemed very fragile to her.

"Um... who are you?" she asked in amazement.

‘She heard me!’ Thought Oliver. ‘I just took a tumble down a living mountain, but she heard me!’

Standing up he looked skyward to see that the young rabbit was indeed looking back at him with a look of surprise, concern, and curiosity.

“He-Hello!” he called out.

She frowned “I can’t hear you very well. I can just make out what your saying.”

‘What? How can she not hear me with ear’s that big?’ he though. ‘There must be some sort of range limit.’

Thinking quickly, Oliver gestured for her to lower her hand down.

“Oh! Okay.”

The young rabbit lowered her hand palm up to ground level. She waited patiently as the tiny creature climbed into it and carefully lifted her hand up to her face. For the human it was a strange sensation. It was like being in a really big platform elevator. Aside from his ears popping he felt perfectly safe considering he was in a giant hand.

Cream silently whispered being unsure if she was too loud for him: "Um.. well.. who are you?" she said smiling.

She did try to keep her voice as calm as possible as she was unsure if he would be afraid of her size to him.

"I am Cream!" she introduced herself.

The human looked up into Cream’s face, her smile having a relaxing effect on him. He knew then that he had nothing to fear from her.

“Oliver,” he replied. “What is this place?”

“This is the great forest.”

“What world?”

“Huh?”

“Never mind.” Oliver looked up at Cream. “Is everyone around here as big as you?”

“Bigger” Said Cream carefully sitting on the ground. “I’m only a little girl.”

“Not from where I’m sitting,” Oliver mumbled under his breath.

Cream wondered.. "Hmm.. well.. I was honest.. among my friends.. I am the smallest.. Well, if you count Cheese, he's my little Chao friend - then I am not the smallest.. but he cannot speak. "She then said.. "Oh where are you? Cheese!" she called.

Cheese was flying over.. still a tremendous amount larger than Ash. "Chao chao" the little chao cheered.

Cheese then smiled again: "Aww.. you little one are so cute, you know that."

"But well.. Tails is taller than me.. Mr. Sonic is taller.. and Mummy is like so tall.." she added.

She then asked: "Do you want to meet them?"
13411.title: Climb up onto Cream

choices: "Would you like to play a game?"
134111.content:
Oliver looked around at the creature flying about wondering how it stayed in the air. He wasn’t too sure about meeting others like Cream just yet. He was just getting used to Cream’s presence, he wasn’t sure his mind could take meeting more so soon.

“Uh, not just yet Cream.” He explained, “I need time to get used to all of this. Were I’m from people your size where only read about in story books.”

“Okay, would you like to see my room?”

Oliver thought for a moment. He didn’t want to be a burden to Cream, but he knew the odds of him surviving on his own were not in his favor.

“Sure, I’d liked to.”

“Okay, I’ll put you in my pocket so I won’t loose you.”

“Good idea, I wouldn’t want to fall from this height.”

Cream cupped her hand and carefully lowered Oliver into her dress pocket. He noted it was very deep. ‘Good,’ he though ‘less chances of falling out.’

Cream Picked up her basket of flowers and started for home, happy that she had made a new friend, even though he was a little on the tiny side. She tried to walk carefully rather than her usual jumping around.

"Is it okay like this?" she asked to her pocket.

She heard a "Yes" and went on.

***

10 minutes Cream entered the House she shared with her mother. "Mum, I am back" she called.

"Hi dearie!" said Vanilla meeting her daughter at the door.

Cream then handed over the basket of flowers: "Those are for you!" she said.

Vanilla smiled: "Thank you very much. They are wonderful. I'll put them on a table right away!"

As Oliver didn't want to see Vanilla (Cream wasn't sure if he peaked out or not) she didn't introduce him just then. Instead she went to her room and locked the door behind herself. Reaching into her pocket she took Oliver out and placed him on the floor.

"I am sorry a bit. Mum always wants me to tidy up so right now it's a bit of a mess."

She took a small 3-inch figure of Sonic off her shelf and placed it next to Oliver. "You should know him, he's the hero of our planet. Oh I have even more figures... so yeah.. Feel free to you look around."

Oliver looked up at the Figure of Sonic. Damn, even a Child’s toy was bigger than him. He didn’t tell her that he honestly never heard of Sonic, though it was safe to say he’d have no trouble recognizing him if this figure represented an accurate likeness. He looked about the room. Over all it didn’t look that messy compared to the way he used to keep his room at that age, he could still remember his mother scolding him about how messy it was.

Oliver watched as Cream tidied up her room. Once and a while she’d glance over to see where he was. She was thinking the same thing Oliver was; and she didn’t want to accidentally step on him either. Oliver walked along a dresser and came upon a Fuzzy slipper. Curious he walked about it. It didn’t seem to belong to Cream. It was much too big.

“Oh, that’s my Mum’s” said Cream glancing over her shoulder “I was using it as a bed for one of my dolls”

This was her mother’s? She must be absolutely enormous! But from what he had heard she seemed to be really nice.
Cream had noticed that Oliver probably didn’t know Sonic. His had looked too confused when she showed him the figure of Sonic. Everyone on the planet would probably have recognized Sonic’s likeness immediately but the way he looked at the figure it was like it was seeing for the first time.

She then remembered his question. "What world?" - it didn't leave her head. Did he imply.. he wasn't like.. from town.. he was from.. Somewhere else entirely. She tried to push the thought away but the more she tried and more lost in it. So much so that she then tripped over a stuffed figure lying on the floor falling forward on her face, nearly landing on Oliver.

“Whoa! You okay?” Oliver asked.

“Yeah I’m okay.” Said Cream standing back up.
134111.title: Going Home with Cream

choices: Oliver Decides he wants to ride in the car
Oliver decides it might be too dangerous
1341111.content:
"Would you like to play with me later? I could do whatever you like, but I guess at your size…Hmmm.”

Cream walked over to her shelf and took something down. “I could put you in this remote-controlled toy car. Might be the first time I actually use this thing Tails built for me. But I guess that would be quite dangerous you know?"

She took the car and placed it in front of him.

“Let me think about it, I’ll let you clean up first. Wouldn’t want you to get in trouble with your Mom.” Said Oliver “Do you mind if I take a look at this?”

“Sure go right ahead.”

Oliver looked about the car. Aside from a more streamline look and an extra two wheels in the back, and of course it was a size or two bigger in scale compared to him, it looked very much like any Earth car he saw everyday. The interior was pretty bare. A seat for a toy four feet taller than himself and that was about it, not even a dash. He looked under the car.

Wow, Oliver was amazed at how complex this toy really was, all those small working parts. This Tails knew his craft. Looked like a battery similar to a lithium ion powered it. A flexible antenna was mounted in the back, no doubt picking up signals from the remote.
1341111.title: "Would you like to play a game?"

13411111.content:
“Cream, how about after your done you take me for a spin around the room?”

An hour later Oliver was sitting inside the car wishing for seatbelts. Well, it was too late to back out, and he didn’t want to disappoint Cream who had actually gotten her heart set on driving him around.

“Ready Oliver?”

“Ready!” he called out and the car started moving.

It was actually going slower than he had thought it would. He had expected to go 300 kilometers an hour in the car; instead it was traveling at a safer 20. Ash was actually enjoying himself. It was like riding in an amusement park ride. And as it turned out Cream was an excellent driver considering her age. Course she bumped into a few things but she was always quick to apologize and ask if Ash was okay.

There was a knock on the door “Cream, may I come in?”

(Who is it?)
13411111.title: Oliver Decides he wants to ride in the car

134111112.content:
“Just a sec Mum” Cream turned to Oliver in the car and whispered, “Stay inside”

Cream unlocked the Door and her mother stepped inside. Oliver had never in his life thought he’d ever see anyone or anything as tall or as enormous as her. Every step she took sent vibrations threw the car and into Oliver. Luckily he was getting use to being around Cream so the sight of her mother wasn’t a complete shock.

“Just wanted to see what you were up do, dearie” said Vanilla. “Oh! You’ve tidied up your room, good for you.” She looked about and saw the car. “Is that the toy Tails made for you?”

Oliver froze as Cream’s mother walked over and picked the car up between two fingers. He thought of what he could do, he couldn’t hide and there was no way he was going to jump out, so he stood perfectly still as Vanilla peered into the inside of the car.

“Amazing, he even put a little driver inside.” Said Vanilla as she examined the car. Then She handed the car over to Cream “ Supper’s almost ready. I’ll call you out when it’s done.”

With that she left the room closing the door behind her.

Cream then breathed up: "Phew.. I guess I am lucky she didn't see you move." Cream looked it at Oliver. "And basically.. even in there you look totally misplaced. How much did you actually see when you looked forward? I know there's no dash or anything related but... when you sit don't you just look into the foot well area? You were probably also standing on the driver's seat for most of the time to actually see any thing at all.”

“I saw plenty.” Said Oliver as he climbed out of the toy and into her hand. “Including your Mom.”

“How did you stay so still? She thought you were a little toy.”

“I was too scared to moved.” Said Oliver.

“Scared? Why would you be scared of my M- Oh…” Cream thought of how Ash saw the world, of course he’d be scared. Her Mom was so much bigger than she was. “Do you find me scary Oliver?”

Oliver looked up at Cream. She looked like she was on the verge of tears“ Only at first. Seeing someone your size for the first time is a real shock.” He sat down in her palm and gave it a friendly tap “But I’m not scared of you now. And I’m sure your Mom wouldn’t mind me being here, and I wouldn’t want you to keep a secret from her, but I need more time to get use to everything before you tell her. Okay?”

"Okay. Don't worry about my Mum, she is the nicest mother I can imagine. She can be a bit strict sometimes but I guess she'd immediately accept you around." Cream explained. Putting the toy car on her little table near her bed.

"Guess how I got my Chao..” She said as she hugged Cheese. “Cheese followed me and Mum agreed I may raise him! So I am sure you'd also be welcome here! Of course only if you like to stay." Cream added hopefully.

“I’ll stay, I have nowhere else to go. And it’s been fun” Oliver saw a big smile form on Cream’s face “Just think of me as your favorite Martian.”

Cream frowned “ I thought you were from Earth.”

“Oops I forgot, you’ve never seen that program. I’ll have to tell you about it later.”

“Cream! Supper’s ready!”
134111112.title: Vanilla

choices: Oliver comes up with his own game
1341111122.content:
“ You go on ahead. I’ll wait around here for you.”

“Okay,” Cream lowered her hand to her bedroom floor for Oliver to climb out “I’ll bring something back for you”

“I’d like that.” Said Oliver. “Thank you”

“Back in a bit” with that she left the room with her chao following her. Try as he might, Ash still couldn’t figure out how that creature stayed in the air.

Cream was just walking down with her mother to get something to eat. She was chatting with her and not talking yet about Oliver. she blushed a bit thinking ‘His voice sounds male... so would people think my boy-friend would be with me now.. nah, he's so tiny, he couldn't be my boy-friend.. Still, just he looks so adorable!’

While Cream was away, Oliver continued looking around the room. The closet door was opened and upon walking closer to it he discovered she had several suits just like the one she was wearing, not a bad idea, that way you didn’t have to think about what to wear, just put the next clean suit on.

He walked up to one of her shoes that were on its side. Since he’d first seen here there was something Oliver was curious about. He climbed up into it. The first thing that he noticed was the smell. It wasn’t like human foot smell but more earthly and nowhere near as unpleasant. Walking along the inside he could make out the outline of Cream’s Foot. It would seem that just as her hands were human-like so were her feet.

Climbing out of the shoe he began to have thoughts about them. For some reason he wanted to see what they looked like for himself. But, no, should he even dare to ask? What would she say if he did? He could feel his face going red from embracement just thinking about it.

He heard and felt footsteps. A moment later Cream walked into the room.

“Oliver? Where are you?”

“Over here!” he called out waving his arms “By your closet!”

Cream walked over Kneeling down she smiled "I got you something to eat."

She handed Oliver what looked like a blue Pea. He was uncertain at first, but upon taking a bite he found it really tasted good.

“What would you like to do now? I’ve got an hour before bedtime”

‘Oh boy…’ thought Oliver.

Cream looked around. "Hmmm.. you know I could play a little game with you.. just.. well, you know.. would you be able to handle the dice?"

She took out a board of a Monopoly like game and then compared a die to Oliver... "No, that won't work I guess!" she said seeing as the die was going up to his waist. "Oh wait.. "

She went to her other cupboard and took out some more games.. one also featured dice.. they were considerably smaller than usual dice - still much larger than normal dice for Ash but nice to play.. "You could play your own figure, you know?" she proposed.
1341111122.title: Oliver Stays in Cream's room

13411111221.content:
Oliver looked about the room. Up on a shelf was a toy spaceship, one of those toony saucer types.

"Hey Cream, Is there anyway I can get inside that Spaceship up there?"

Cream Looked at the toy "Oh yes, the top lifts off, but I don't have a toy small enough to fit in it."

"You have me, I'm small enough. How about we play with it?"

"Okay!" said Cream Happily. Upon getting the spaceship, she asked "What are we going to play?"

"I was thinking something called....Explorer"

"What's Explorer?"

"Well, I climb into the Space ship" Oliver explained "And you pretend to fly it around anywhere in the House, and where you land the Spaceship, I have to Explore."

"Oh! That sounds like fun, so anywhere?"

"Yeah, anywhere."

"Okay, Climb aboard! "

Climbing up into the circular cockpit wasn't easy for Oliver due to the slipperiness of the plastic, but Cream helped him along with her finger. Once inside the canopy was closed. As Cream held the toy between her fingers he gave her a thumbs up.

"Atomic batteries to power! Turbines to speed!"

As Cream lifted the toy Spaceship it almost felt like real take off as he felt the tug of gravity when it was lifted upward. Most of his view of the outside was obscured by Cream's gloved fingers, which was fine as he didn't want to know where Cream was taking him. After pretending to fly the ship for a moment or two he felt Cream lower the spaceship to a landing. When her fingers moved away and the canopy was opened, Oliver saw that he was--

134111112212.title: In her Mother's Bedroom

13411111222.content:
“Sure.”

For a half an hour Oliver and Cream played the Board game. Oliver didn’t know the rules that well, which is probably why Cream won every game. Not that he cared, She was having fun, and that’s all that mattered to him. After a while she put the game away and placed Oliver on her bed. He heard her footwear slip off. Sitting on her bed, Cream swung her socked feet over and bent her knees so as she sat the soles of her feet were on either side of him.

“Mum doesn’t like me wearing shoes on the bed,” she explained. “Oops, I guess my feet kinda stink.”

Oliver sniffed the air. There was indeed a strong sent from her socked feet but nothing that was unbearable. It didn’t smell like humans. It had the smell of stale popcorn.
